jobs.name: daily-hermes-backup
jobs.prompt:
Run a daily backup of Hermes configuration to GitHub. 

Steps:
1. Navigate to /root/roofing_leads/hermes-backup
2. Check if there are any changes to commit
3. If changes exist, add all files, commit with timestamp, and push to origin main
4. Also backup the leads data files from /root/roofing_leads/ and /root/amaan_academy_leads/ to the same repo

Commands to run:
```
cd /root/roofing_leads/hermes-backup
cp /root/roofing_leads/ALL_ROOFING_LEADS_MASTER.csv . 2>/dev/null
cp /root/amaan_academy_leads/AMAAN_ACADEMY_LEADS.csv . 2>/dev/null
git add -A
git commit -m "Daily backup - $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" || true
git push origin main || echo "Push failed - check credentials"
```

Report success or failure.
